name: otter-village
description: A mobile-first 3D multiplayer social village game

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,green "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:shared && npm run typecheck:client && npm run typecheck:server
